mapper.insert: INSERT INTO noticeComment ( userId, userName, comment, noticeSeq ) VALUES ( #{userId}, #{userName}, #{comment}, #{noticeSeq} )
mapper.select: SELECT noticeCommentSeq, userId, userName, comment, DATE_FORMAT(createdAt, '%Y-%m-%d %H:%i') AS createdAt FROM noticeComment WHERE noticeSeq = ${noticeSeq} ORDER BY noticeCommentSeq DESC
